parsed.subtask_body: I constructed an improved MWIS candidate by prioritizing high-weight vertices and iteratively adding non-conflicting vertices. I then performed local swaps, such as replacing V002 (7) with V062 (10) and V045 (4) with V083 (5), and added several non-conflicting vertices like V100 (5), V087 (5), and V057 (4). The final set contains 34 vertices with a total weight of 369.
